arts.ttl: LIVE: Liverpool face Newcastle United in Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: Follow all the updates from Wembley Stadium.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains decision to start Caoimhin Kelleher over Alisson in Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: Kelleher will start his third Carabao Cup final for Liverpool and playing a key role in the victories against Chelsea in 2022 and 2024

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Newcastle confirmed lineups: Konate, Alisson, Isak, Barnes decisions made for EFL Cup final
arts.sum: Liverpool and Newcastle United confirm their starting lineups for this afternoon's EFL Cup final at Wembley Stadium.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United Wembley goalkeeper decision revealed as Eddie Howe names cup final XI
arts.sum: But even though Dubravka essentially got Newcastle to the final with two clean sheets against Arsenal, it is England international Pope who kept his place after starting the last three games. Head coach Eddie Howe had stated he faced a tough choice in goal but that he wanted anybody not selected to support their team-mates and put disappointment behind them.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Newcastle: Confirmed Lineups, Team News and Score Prediction
arts.sum: It’s the EFL Cup final today as Liverpool take on Newcastle at Wembley with the first piece of domestic silverware up for grabs. Liverpool vs Newcastle Team News Arne Slot has serious in d...

arts.ttl: Sandro Tonali Newcastle United chants - full song lyrics to Italian cult hero
arts.sum: His ban from football last season may have limited his game time on the pitch, but the black and white faithful showed their support from the stands and the Italian midfielder has shown this season why the Magpies were keen to spend a reported £55million on him. It was during his aforementioned ban from football that the Newcastle faithful came up with a new chant to show their support, this time to the tune of Dutch carnival anthem Links Rechts.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Newcastle: Carabao Cup final updates – live
arts.sum: All the latest from Wembley (4.30pm kick-off GMT) Get in touch with John with your opinions In the Premier League today, important for Newcastle, this. Full-time: Fulham 2-0 Tottenham. Marco Silva’s team up to eighth. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Newcastle to replace Isak with €85m striker who is 'IN CRISIS'
arts.sum: Newcastle are interested in signing Randal Kolo Muani as a potential replacement for Alexander Isak, according to Italian media. Kolo Muani has not found the back of the net in a month and Gazzetta dello Sports reports how the striker is 'in crisis.' He is still favoured by coach Thiago Motta over the much-maligned Dusan Vlahovic, but Juventus are considering different solutions for the summer.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United players treated to private James Bay concert on eve of Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: Newcastle United players were treated to a private concert from James Bay at the team's hotel on the eve of the Carabao Cup final. Speaking to fans at the Boxpark at Wembley, Bay told the 2,500 lucky ticket holders that he had a good feeling about Newcastle's chances but would not sing another song until after the match.

arts.ttl: Tottenham, Newcastle keeping tabs on 20-year-old prospect admired by Lionel Messi
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Newcastle United are reportedly keeping tabs on the Inter Miami midfielder, Benjamin Cremaschi. The 20-year-old United States International has impressed with his performances in the MLS and the Premier League clubs are monitoring his progress, as per TBR Football.
